free_text: Differential cross section measurement of 16O(d,p0,1)
reactions at energies and angles relevant to NRA
Solid 16O target was prepared by
anodizing tantalum substrate.
The detection system included four 300 um-
thick surface barrier detectors (located at 90, 135,
150 and 165 degrees toward incident beam) which were
covered with 26 um-thick Kapton foil to suppress
elastically scattered deuterons and alpha particles
from (d,a) reaction, and another detector was used
for beam monitoring (located at 165 toward incident
beam).
The total uncertainties were calculated from
the statistical and total systematic uncertainties.
Numerical data received from Dr. O.Kakuee
VS
Plotted on figs. 2a-2d of Nucl. Instr. Meth.
Plotted on figs. 3a-3d of Nucl. Instr. Meth.
